text.content: Pitch framework that landed Parmar + Langan today: 'Doc, our goal is to get those expensive biologics your patients sit on for the lowest out-of-pocket cost possible and delivered in a timely manner.' Keep it short. Less information = simpler close. Don't info-overload — give them the answer they're looking for. The real sellers are PA/office staff (40% PA acceptance rate is their pain). Office staff happy → orders flow direct to Insight Outpatient Pharmacy. Better PA from office team = lower lab expense for us. Permanent note: vault/notes/2026-05-14-sp-pitch-framework.md.

text.content: Three months remain on Sovereign Phoenix exclusive contract — hard countdown to acquisition. Takeover must be COMPLETE (no room for existing management to siphon funds or sabotage). Sequencing change: Luis must first clean up his bad-standing history with Healthfirst (HF may re-interview owners under new mgmt and use any unresolved past issues as a reason to drop the contract). ONLY AFTER Luis cleanup is complete do we gather Aaron + Ahmed + DocPro for the purchase/rewire conversation. Kader untrust thesis confirmed: no transparency on numbers + dishonest dealings = the explicit reason we cut business to SAIPA. Cannot be involved in clean takeover.

text.content: AiBuilersClub

Captured product-design spec for Natalie (phlebotomy assistant) in vault/Labaide/Labaide Poteitnial addons.md. Components: (1) test-time compute generating structured outputs until ruleset matches, (2) AI-as-judge evaluation (Gemini as evaluator) for coherence/visibility/clarity scoring on lab-test/tube queries, (3) prompting tuned to busy phleb voice (80-120 samples/day, zero error tolerance), (4) MCQ post-finetune metric for right-tube-for-test scenarios, (5) separate /self-improve tab for response review in MySQL, (6) later: voice for on-road rep access, (7) later: screen-read for lab-order detection from EMR.
